Award Winning Creative Leader

NIKOLA

RADESKI

Award Winning Creative Leader

Nikola

Radeski

Designer & Founder, based in Skopje, Macedonia

/ Services, Skills, Abilities

What I do best?

I lead brands, teams, and projects – creating design, web, video, and marketing solutions that help businesses grow and make a real impact.

Top performing

01. Web Design

I design no-code websites that are responsive, mobile-friendly, and SEO-ready. Every site is built for usability, speed, and modern design.

  • Figma
  • Framer
  • Webflow
  • Vercel
  • WordPress
  • Elementor
  • Avada
  • Experienced with AI builders

MVP Go-to-market

02. Product Design

I build ideas from concept to GTM and scale them into real products. I focus on scope, flows, and aligning features with what users actually need.

  • MVP Design
  • Pitch Decks
  • Brand Identity
  • Product Positioning,
  • Marketing Collateral
  • Investor Presentations

User Focused

03. UI/UX Systems

I design user journeys, wireframes, and prototypes that make digital products easy to use. Testing and research keep the experience grounded in reality.

  • Figma
  • Framer
  • Webflow
  • WordPress
  • Elementor
  • Avada
  • Vercel, Lovable, Bolt, +10 other AI platforms

Brand Defining

04. Graphic Design

Highly skilled in creating digital visuals, banners, ads, and posts to deliver clear messaging and engage.

  • Adobe Creative Suite, Photoshop, Illustrator
  • Figma, FigJam, Canva
  • Branding, logos, and visual identity design
  • Marketing materials: flyers, brochures, posters
  • Social media visuals and campaigns
  • Typography and layout design

Detail Driven + AI

05. Visual Design

You name it, I do it. Compelling digital visuals that combine aesthetics with clear communication.

  • Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator
  • Figma, Canva
  • Midjourney, Leonardo, Dall-E
  • GPT, NanoBanana, Gemini, Krea
  • Runway, Firefly, Sora
  • High-performing AI media content

Motion with Purpose

06. Video Editing

Expert in video storytelling, explainers, cinematic and promotional content to boost brand presence.

  • Adobe After Effects, Adobe Premiere
  • Promotional videos
  • Color correction / Color grading
  • Motion Graphics / Explainers
  • Sound engineering
  • Topaz Labs + Video scaling
  • AI Video Content Gen

Data Backed Decisions

07. Digital Marketing

I was leading teams twice, in the Marketing sector. I plan and run campaigns across search, social, and email. Every move is tracked and optimized for growth, leads, and ROI.

  • Google Analytics, Google Ads, Meta Ads, Mailchimp, HubSpot, Google Search Console
  • SEO and SEM
  • Email marketing campaigns
  • Paid social and search campaigns
  • Big results for clients with targetted ads
  • Fluent with Notion, Jira, Trello

Audience Growing

08. Social Media Marketing

I have grown many channels I managed to big numbers, I also designed and organized content and engagement strategies.

  • Content planning and posting schedules
  • Campaign creation and paid ads
  • Social analytics and reporting
  • Community engagement and management

/ About Me

Creative at the Core

Creative at the core

Designer. Marketer. Founder. Problem-solver.

With 13 years of experience, I bridge my creativity and my ability to adapt quickly, solve problems across departments, and produce work that strengthens brands, drive revenue growth and when given a chance, support teams through leadership.

My impact is incomparable.

I work with founders, product teams, companies and brands based on strategy and innovation. I set one goal, cut noise, and move. When the job is done, the result is live and measured, not just designed.

/ Common questions and answers

Frequently Asked Questions

How do you ensure high-quality work?

I follow industry standards, use professional-grade tools, and maintain a strong attention to detail in every project, delivering polished results that match each client’s goals.

What industries and clients have you worked with?

I’ve collaborated with a diverse range of clients — from startups to established brands — delivering design, web, video, and marketing solutions they trust.

Do you work independently or as part of a team?

Both. I thrive leading teams and working alongside them.
In my last three positions, I’ve successfully led design and marketing teams, mentoring talent and driving projects to completion. At the same time, I’m equally comfortable contributing as a team member under another leader’s direction, always focused on achieving outstanding results together.

What makes you a good team player?

Clear communication, openness to feedback, and a collaborative attitude – I value the team’s success as much as my own and help wherever I can.

How do you approach client feedback?

I listen carefully, take feedback on board, and iterate to align the project with client expectations while maintaining creative and technical excellence.

Have you handled large or complex projects?

Yes. I have successfully managed long-term, multi-faceted projects, breaking them into clear phases to deliver quality on time and on brief.

Why do clients trust you?

Clients appreciate my reliability, my commitment to their goals, and my ability to translate their vision into effective, polished design and marketing solutions.

If you build agency, why apply for an in-house role?

I want to focus my energy on one team and one product, but at the same time I have been building side-projects (or side-hustles) for over 4-5 years. I love to build products. I thrive when multi-tasking and when I work on multiple platforms.

I like leading design, mentoring people, and building a healthy, high-output culture. An in-house role lets me do that every day.

What you get from me:

  • A hands-on lead who ships and raises the bar.

  • A mentor who shares clear systems and feedback.

  • A calm teammate who brings good energy and standards.

Commitment and fit:

  • The role is my first priority.

  • I always do side projects, I like to build stuff, but I keep them light and off-hours. They help me learn and bring fresh ideas back.

  • I stay loyal where my work is valued and impact is clear.
